title: PlayerLocation
description: Player view depth and position. Alias of unified Location type (player validation profile). Discriminated by which nested objects are present.
x-infinity-note: Canonical type name is Location; PlayerLocation is a player-presence alias.

oneOf.title: PlayerLocationInCube
oneOf.description: Player in Galaxy View — cube depth.

oneOf.title: PlayerLocationInStarSystem
oneOf.description: Player in Solar System View — star-system depth.

oneOf.title: PlayerLocationOnPlanet
oneOf.description: Player at planet depth — overview (planet.id only) or hex-selected (planet.id + hex_coords).
